ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the economic series being forecasted */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Period of the forecast (e.g., YEARLY, QUARTERLY) */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., MACRO) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Forecasting method used */,
  "v1" REAL /* Forecast value for variable 1 */,
  "v2" REAL /* Forecast value for variable 2 */,
  "v3" REAL /* Forecast value for variable 3 */,
  "v4" REAL /* Forecast value for variable 4 */,
  "v5" REAL /* Forecast value for variable 5 */,
  "v6" REAL /* Forecast value for variable 6 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series (e.g., N0296) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the series was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., YEARLY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_accuracy" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy record */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecast entry */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error of the forecast */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Square Error of the forecast */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error of the forecast */,
  "percentage_error" REAL /* Percentage error of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accuracy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accuracy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_accuracy_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method used */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast entry */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric being evaluated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the forecast */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the versioning */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being commented on */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration record */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method used */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast entry */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "configuration_values" TEXT /* Values for the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_configurations_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_configurations_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method used */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast entry */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric being evaluated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)
